title: Santa Ana, SA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Santa Ana is a city in SA with a population of 280,000. El Salvador’s second city, a beautiful colonial city with a stunning Gothic cathedral and nearby coffee plantations.
